web_results.title: Phoenix Suns - Wikipedia
web_results.description: The Suns own the NBA's fifth-best all-time winning percentage, have the highest winning percentage of any team to have never won an NBA championship, and have the most NBA Finals appearances (three) without a championship. 13 Hall of Famers have played for Phoenix, while two – Barkley and Nash – won NBA Most Valuable Player (MVP) while playing for the team.
